overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit Night City street at night. The scene features wet asphalt reflecting colorful signage, Japanese-inspired architecture, futuristic vehicles, and a dense urban atmosphere with a mix of modern and traditional elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with apartment services

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet street past the apartment services building with the illuminated W logo

entered.detail: tall building with illuminated W logo and neon signage
large glowing white W sign on building facade
large blue neon sign with Japanese text HOテル
traditional red lanterns hanging above the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wet neon-lit street at night, passing the apartment services building with its prominent W logo. The street is lined with tall buildings blocking the sky, and a distant hotel sign becomes visible ahead.

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the wide street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street toward the sidewalk lined with yellow construction barriers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow pants walking across the street in the opposite direction

entered.detail: yellow plastic construction barriers lining the sidewalk edge
large illuminated billboard with ALL FOODS text and character image

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide intersection, passing yellow construction barriers on the right. The ALL FOODS billboard becomes prominent as the apartment services building recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with large digital billboards

events.description: white futuristic sedan drives past on the street from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk as a futuristic vehicle passes by on the left

entered.detail: large white billboard with COLA text and character in hat
building facade with AVANTE signage and geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: Walking along the barrier-lined sidewalk, a white futuristic sedan passes on the street. The character approaches an intersection with a prominent COLA billboard on the left and the AVANTE building on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with hanging lanterns

events.description: enters narrower street section with traditional hanging paper lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking past the corner convenience store and through the lantern-lit alleyway toward the overpass

entered.detail: storefront with glass windows and illuminated interior
circular yellow neon OPEN sign above store entrance
traditional white paper lanterns with red symbols hanging across the street
large concrete overpass structure spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower alleyway with traditional hanging paper lanterns. The character passes a corner convenience store with a glowing OPEN sign and continues toward a large concrete overpass structure in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched urban corridor that shifts from a wide commercial thoroughfare into a narrow, traditional alleyway. It begins with the character walking down a wet street past an apartment services building marked with a prominent W logo, moving toward a distant hotel sign beneath a canopy of towering skyscrapers. As the character crosses a wide intersection, the apartment building recedes and the view opens up to reveal yellow construction barriers and a massive ALL FOODS billboard. The camera then follows the character along the sidewalk past a speeding white futuristic sedan, transitioning through another intersection framed by a COLA billboard and the AVANTE building. Finally, the scene narrows into a dim alleyway adorned with hanging paper lanterns and a glowing convenience store sign before heading toward a massive concrete overpass in the distance.
